guide.title: Complete Beginner Guide
guide.midGameDesc: Once stable, increase profit and join a guild.
guide.endGameDesc: Highest tier — Outlands and Black Zone farming.
guide.professionsDesc: Each profession has a different tier journey. Click to see details.

hero.title: Albion Online Farming Guide
hero.description: Master resource gathering across all tiers. From beginner zones to the most dangerous T8 Outlands.

builds.title: Recommended Gathering Builds
builds.description: Optimize your equipment for maximum efficiency and safety while gathering.

biomes.title: Biome Distribution
biomes.description: Each city specializes in different resources.

biome_descriptions.swamp: Mystical wetlands with abundant fiber resources and hidden dangers in the mist.
biome_descriptions.forest: Ancient woodlands filled with towering trees and rich wood resources.
biome_descriptions.mountain: Majestic peaks with glowing ore deposits and treacherous terrain.
biome_descriptions.highland: Rocky plateaus with plentiful stone and valuable mineral deposits.
biome_descriptions.steppe: Vast plains where hunters gather hides and fiber under the setting sun.

tiers.title: Tier Progression Guide
tiers.description: From T1 beginner zones to T8 Outlands — every tier covered.

gathering.title: Gathering Equipment Progression
gathering.description: Equipment guide from low to high tier. Click a profession to see details.

t8Maps.title: T8 Farming Locations
t8Maps.description: Specific map names for each resource type in the Outlands Black Zone.

events.title: Asia Server Events & Schedule
events.description: Important events and timings for Asia server farming activities.
events.worldBossDesc: World Bosses spawn every even-numbered hour (00:00, 02:00...) on Asia server.
events.worldBossNote: High risk, high reward farming opportunity
events.primeTimeDesc: Peak activity period for PvP and guild activities. Extreme danger in black zones.
events.primeTimeNote: Best time for group farming with guild protection
events.dangerWindowDesc: Highest concentration of gankers and PvP players. Avoid solo gathering in black zones.
events.dangerWindowNote: Stick to blue/yellow zones or farm with group
events.lowActivityDesc: Safest time for solo farming with reduced competition and ganking risk.
events.lowActivityNote: Best for new players and solo farmers

efficiency.title: Efficiency Tips
tips: Use Pork Pie to increase carry capacity
Gather in biomes matching your resource type
Focus on one resource to T8 for max profit
Use Learning Points to speed up leveling
efficiency.radiantTip: Tip: Use the new Loot All button from Radiant Wilds for faster PvE farming!

safety.title: Safety Strategies
tips: Use Invisibility Shrines for safe travel
Travel with guild members when possible

profitability.title: Resource Profitability
tips: Hide & Fiber: High competition, varied profit

footer.text: Albion Online Farming Guide 2026 • Last Updated: May 2026
